name: 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets
about: 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets are solid tablets used as a treatment for type 2 diabetes. The tablets contain 50 MG of Vildagliptin, a drug that regulates insulin levels in the body. This medication is taken orally, and the recommended dosage is determined by a healthcare professional. The tablets are stored in a dry place to maintain their efficacy. These tablets are manufactured in India as a general medicine and are available from various exporters, suppliers, and traders.

faq.q: How should I take 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: The recommended dosage and duration of treatment of 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets should be determined by a healthcare professional. It is usually taken orally with or without food.

faq.q: What are the possible side effects of 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: The common side effects of 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets include headache, nausea, and stomach pain. In rare cases, it can cause allergic reactions, pancreatitis, or liver problems.

faq.q: Can 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets be taken with other medications?
faq.a: Inform your healthcare professional about all the medications you are taking before starting 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets. It may interact with other drugs, including insulin or medications used for high blood pressure.

faq.q: What should I do if I miss a dose of 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: Take the missed dose as soon as you remember. However, if it is almost time for your next dose, skip the missed dose and continue with your regular dosing schedule.

faq.q: Are there any precautions I should take before starting 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets?
faq.a: Inform your healthcare professional if you have a history of pancreatitis or liver problems. It is also important to maintain a healthy diet and exercise regularly while taking 50 MG Vildagliptin Tablets.
